text.title: Architect PR Review Checklist — Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the architect-review record shape. Reviewer or agent producing the record must satisfy this contract before the PR is allowed to merge under architect approval.

forbidden.pattern: decision=approve while ai_specific_checks contain unresolved AI-specific findings (if ai_generated_flag=true)
review_duration_min < 5 with PR size > 200 lines AND decision=approve (rubber-stamp signal)
section finding contradicts a referenced ADR but no proposal to update ADR is included (silent violation)
free-text "lgtm" / "ship it" without any section_findings populated
PR > 500 lines AND decision != split-requested AND review_duration_min > 30 (PR is too large, should be split)

allowed-transformations.transformation: Mark a section N/A-with-reason when truly inapplicable (e.g., performance section for a docs-only PR) — reason must be one short sentence.
Reference an existing review record from a sibling PR if findings are identical (same pattern in two PRs).
Collapse multiple line-level comments into a single section finding when they share a root cause.

list.item: All six sections have a status (pass / needs-changes / N/A-with-reason / escalate) (r1)
If PR is AI-generated, all four AI-specific checks done (r4)
Each finding references an ADR OR proposes a new one (r5)
Decision aligns with findings (no "approve" with open needs-changes) (f1)
If escalating, the escalation forum + context is named (r3)
